unresolved: Prism's `references serialize` result is name-ambiguous across JsonSerializer, JsonSerializable, JsonGenerator, and local helper methods; I filtered by the JsonSerializer type/override surface, but could not get prism to emit a fully disambiguated references set for only com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonSerializer#serialize. Anonymous serializer implementations are reported by prism under their enclosing factory/modifier methods, so those sites are listed by enclosing method rather than an anonymous class symbol.
